## What changed

Brief description of the changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I edited only `src/` (not `platforms/` or marketplace manifests directly)
- [ ] `node scripts/validate.js` passes
- [ ] `node scripts/build.js` was run and `platforms/` changes are committed
- [ ] `node scripts/generate-catalog.js` was run and `CATALOG.md` changes are committed
- [ ] Version bumped in `package.json` if this is a release-worthy change
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if applicable
- [ ] README / docs updated if user-facing changes

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New platform
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Build/tooling improvement
- [ ] Breaking change
